title: Defense stocks slide again, as Germany’s naval U-turn shakes confidence in Europe’s rearmament boom
summary_full: Rheinmetall and other European defense stocks fell for a second day, after Germany scrapped the F126 naval program, raising procurement concerns.
summary_public: Rheinmetall and other European defense stocks fell for a second day, after Germany scrapped the F126 naval program, raising procurement concerns.

DE.label: negative
DE.evidence: Germany’s naval U-turn shakes confidence in Europe’s rearmament boom
